info.title: Microsoft Planner
info.description: Microsoft Graph Planner API connector for managing plans, tasks, buckets, rosters, and business scenarios (preview).

post.description: Sends JSON-RPC requests to invoke Planner tools via MCP.

get.description: Get all Planner plans for a Microsoft 365 group.

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: The ID of the Microsoft 365 group

get.description: Get a specific Planner plan by ID.

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: The ETag of the plan for concurrency control

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: The ETag of the plan for concurrency control

type.description: The type of container (e.g., group, roster)

get.description: Get the details of a Planner plan including category descriptions and shared-with info.

patch.description: Update plan details such as category labels.

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: The ETag of the plan details

get.description: Get all buckets in a Planner plan.
Get all tasks in a Planner plan.
Get a specific Planner task by ID.

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: The ETag of the task for concurrency control

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: The ETag of the task for concurrency control

get.description: Get the details of a Planner task including description, checklist, and references.

patch.description: Update the details of a Planner task.

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: The ETag of the task details

previewType.description: Type of preview shown on the task

get.description: Get a specific Planner bucket by ID.

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: The ETag of the bucket for concurrency control

parameters.name: If-Match
parameters.description: The ETag of the bucket for concurrency control

planId.description: The ID of the plan the bucket belongs to

get.description: Get all tasks in a Planner bucket.
Get all Planner tasks assigned to the current user.

post.description: Archive a Planner plan. Archived plans and their tasks/buckets become read-only. Requires If-Match ETag header.

parameters.name: planId
parameters.description: The ID of the plan to archive

post.description: Unarchive a previously archived Planner plan. Requires If-Match ETag header.

parameters.name: planId
parameters.description: The ID of the plan to unarchive

post.description: Move a Planner plan from one container to another (e.g., from a user container to a group container).

parameters.name: planId
parameters.description: The ID of the plan to move

container.description: The target container for the plan

containerId.description: The ID of the target container (e.g., group ID)

type.description: The type of the target container (e.g., group, roster, user)

get.description: Get all Planner plans for the current user.
Get all Planner plans marked as favorites by the current user.
Get all Planner plans recently viewed by the current user.
Get all Planner tasks in the current user's My Day view.
Get the board format for a task on the Assigned To view of task board.

patch.description: Update the board format for a task on the Assigned To view. Requires If-Match ETag header.

get.description: Get the board format for a task on the Progress view of task board.

patch.description: Update the board format for a task on the Progress view. Requires If-Match ETag header.

get.description: Get the board format for a task on the Bucket view of task board.

patch.description: Update the board format for a task on the Bucket view. Requires If-Match ETag header.

get.description: Get newly created, updated, or deleted Planner tasks using delta query. Use the deltaLink from the response for subsequent calls to get incremental changes.

parameters.name: $deltatoken
parameters.description: The delta token from a previous response for incremental changes

@odata.nextLink.description: URL for the next page of results

@odata.deltaLink.description: URL to get incremental changes since this response

post.description: Create a new Planner roster (a non-group container for plans).

get.description: Get a specific Planner roster by ID.
Get all members of a Planner roster.

post.description: Add a member to a Planner roster.

userId.description: The ID of the user to add

tenantId.description: The tenant ID of the user (optional)

delete.description: Remove a member from a Planner roster.

parameters.name: memberId
parameters.description: The ID of the roster member

get.description: Get all plans in a Planner roster.
Get all business scenarios in the tenant.

post.description: Create a new business scenario for Planner integration.

displayName.description: Display name of the business scenario

uniqueName.description: Unique name in reverse DNS format (e.g., com.contoso.apps.myScenario)

ownerAppIds.description: App IDs that own this scenario

get.description: Get a specific business scenario by ID.

parameters.name: scenarioId
parameters.description: The ID of the business scenario

parameters.name: scenarioId
parameters.description: The ID of the business scenario

delete.description: Delete a business scenario and all its associated data.

parameters.name: scenarioId
parameters.description: The ID of the business scenario

get.description: Get the Planner configuration for a business scenario.

parameters.name: scenarioId
parameters.description: The ID of the business scenario

post.description: Get the plan reference for a business scenario targeting a specific group.

parameters.name: scenarioId
parameters.description: The ID of the business scenario

groupId.description: The ID of the target group

get.description: Get all tasks for a business scenario.

parameters.name: scenarioId
parameters.description: The ID of the business scenario

post.description: Create a new task for a business scenario.

parameters.name: scenarioId
parameters.description: The ID of the business scenario

groupId.description: The ID of the target group

externalObjectId.description: Unique external ID for the task within the tenant

externalBucketId.description: External bucket ID for plan configuration buckets

priority.description: Priority of the task (0-10, lower is higher priority)

get.description: Get the Planner plan configuration for a business scenario.

parameters.name: scenarioId
parameters.description: The ID of the business scenario

patch.description: Update the Planner plan configuration for a business scenario.

parameters.name: scenarioId
parameters.description: The ID of the business scenario

get.description: Get the Planner task configuration for a business scenario.

parameters.name: scenarioId
parameters.description: The ID of the business scenario

patch.description: Update the Planner task configuration for a business scenario.

parameters.name: scenarioId
parameters.description: The ID of the business scenario

id.description: The unique identifier of the plan

owner.description: ID of the group that owns the plan

createdDateTime.description: Date and time the plan was created

id.description: The unique identifier of the task

planId.description: Plan ID the task belongs to

bucketId.description: Bucket ID the task belongs to

planId.description: The plan to create the task in

id.description: The unique identifier of the bucket

planId.description: Plan ID the bucket belongs to

id.description: The unique identifier of the roster

uniqueName.description: Unique name in reverse DNS format

localizations.description: Localized names for plan and buckets

orderHintsByAssignee.description: Dictionary of order hints keyed by assignee user ID

orderHint.description: Order hint for the Progress view
Order hint for the Bucket view

scopes.BusinessScenarioConfig.ReadWrite.OwnedBy: Read and write business scenario configurations
scopes.BusinessScenarioData.ReadWrite.OwnedBy: Read and write business scenario data
